data.text:
Committed. AC verification:

- `nodeColorClass()` returns `node-stale` / `node-missing` / `node-fresh` — no raw amber/red/green Tailwind classes (D3Graph.svelte:65-70).
- New `.node-stale/.node-missing/.node-fresh` utilities in app.css reference existing design-token CSS vars (`--tier-fast-*` warning, `--status-blocked-*` error, `--status-closed-*` success); light/dark resolved via the existing token system.
- Node label font-size now uses `text-body-sm` semantic token instead of raw `12px` (D3Graph.svelte:189).
